name: Orange Dream Jello
recipeIngredient: 2 Cans mandarin oranges, drained (11 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the mandarin oranges and reserve 1 cup of the liquid.
2. Dissolve the gelatin in the boiling water and add the reserved liquid.
3. Chill until thick but not set.
4. Fold in the Cool Whip.
5. Arrange orange slices in an oiled 1-quart Jell-O mold.
6. Pour the jello mixture over the oranges.
7. Chill until firm.
8. Garnish with additional orange slices.
